description: Reorder the sections in the changelog to be in chronological order, with the newest version on top. The 'Unreleased' section should remain at the very top.
input_markdown:
# Changelog

## Unreleased

- Added new feature X
- Fixed bug in module Y

## 1.0.0 (2023-05-15)

- Initial public release
- Includes features A, B, C

## 1.1.0 (2023-06-01)

- Added feature D
- Improved performance of feature B

## 1.0.1 (2023-05-20)

- Fixed critical bug in feature C
- Updated documentation

```
TODO: Add 1.1.1 patch release notes
```
expected_markdown:
# Changelog

## Unreleased

- Added new feature X
- Fixed bug in module Y

## 1.1.0 (2023-06-01)

- Added feature D
- Improved performance of feature B

## 1.0.1 (2023-05-20)

- Fixed critical bug in feature C
- Updated documentation

## 1.0.0 (2023-05-15)

- Initial public release
- Includes features A, B, C

```
TODO: Add 1.1.1 patch release notes
```
realism_rationale: Changelog sections often get added out-of-order as new versions are released, requiring periodic reordering to keep them in a logical chronological sequence.
